title: Marketing Data Analyst – Business Banking (w/m/d)
summary: Strong alignment on marketing analytics, funnel analysis and data storytelling; key gaps are SQL/Python, formal 5-year requirement, and Google Analytics / Adobe Analytics platform experience.
key_requirements: Mindestens 5 Jahre Berufspraxis in Marketing Analytics, Business Intelligence oder quantitativem Feld
Nachgewiesenes Know-how in SQL, Datenreporting und Statistik
Erfahrung in digitalen Ökosystemen, bestenfalls im Bankenumfeld
Gute Kenntnisse von Bankprodukten und Finanzdienstleistungen
Ausgezeichnetes Verständnis von Marketing- und Analytics-Plattformen (Google Analytics, Adobe Analytics)
Multi-Channel- und Lifecycle-Daten in strategische Erkenntnisse übersetzen
Sehr gutes PowerPoint-Know-how und überzeugende Kommunikation analytischer Ergebnisse
matched_skills: Marketing analytics and campaign ROI measurement (B2B product launches, trade fairs)
Funnel & conversion analysis (Hapag-Lloyd customer journey, Moli Media live-stream funnels)
Data storytelling for C-level stakeholders (HSBC programme analytics, C-suite reporting)
Financial / programme analytics in FinTech / banking context (HSBC USD 8M digital transformation)
KPI framework design and dashboard development (Power BI, Qlik Sense, Looker Studio)
PowerPoint / MS Office for executive presentations
missing_skills: SQL – not mentioned in CV (core hard requirement)
Google Analytics or Adobe Analytics – candidate uses Power BI / Qlik / SAP Analytics
Formal 5 years in Marketing Analytics / BI – candidate has ~4+ years total (including non-analytics roles)
Deep banking product knowledge (candidate has FinTech exposure via HSBC but not retail/business banking products)
Acquisition funnel analysis in banking context
recommended_emphasis: Lead with HSBC programme analytics role: USD 8M budget variance dashboards, C-suite burn-rate reports – demonstrates FinTech analytics depth
Highlight Power BI certification (PL-300) as evidence of BI tooling seriousness; bridge to analytics platform expectation
Emphasise funnel & behavioural analysis at Hapag-Lloyd as proxy for acquisition funnel analytics
Showcase customer segmentation and cohort analysis as directly matching lifecycle data requirement
Frame C-level data storytelling as the presentation / communication skill ING explicitly requires
Mention any SQL exposure (academic or project) if applicable; otherwise acknowledge as learning target
language_requirement: Fließendes Englisch (C1 – candidate matches); Deutsch ein Plus (candidate B1+ – acceptable)
location_notes: Berlin oder Frankfurt am Main – candidate based in Lüneburg; relocation or remote flexibility would be needed
risk_flags: SQL not evidenced in CV – likely a hard filter in screening
Location: Frankfurt/Berlin vs. Lüneburg – no explicit remote policy mentioned
5-year experience requirement – candidate's timeline is tight (4+ years across multiple roles)
No Google Analytics / Adobe Analytics listed – standard tools for the role
